message:
feat(ingest): streaming output subscription from WezTerm mux (wa-nu4.4.2.1)

Introduce real-time pane output streaming via subscribe_output API with
backpressure guarantees and gap detection:

- StreamEvent enum for delta/closed/disconnected notifications
- StreamIngester for monotonic sequence assignment and gap detection
- StreamChannelConfig with EmitGap and DropOldest overflow policies
- Backpressure: no silent drops, explicit GAP segments on overflow
- All streaming deltas map to existing CapturedSegment types for
  compatibility with the polling path

Supporting infrastructure:
- bench_common.rs: new benchmark helpers for streaming scenarios
- pool.rs: connection pool for WezTerm mux connections with idle
  timeout and acquire timeout, reducing overhead via persistent
  connection reuse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    // Lazy init: cold detect (construction + first compilation)

+        note: "cold first detect: observed ~25ms, ceiling 200ms",
+    },
+    // Lazy init: warm detect (already compiled)

+        max_median_ns: 5_000_000,
+        note: "warm detect: observed ~40us, ceiling 5ms",
+    },
     // Delta extraction: design < 200µs → ceiling 5ms
